title: QueryAgent-R1: Bridging Query Generation and Product Retrieval for E-Commerce Query Recommendation

zh.method_overview: QueryAgent-R1 面向电商搜索框 Query Recommendation，核心是把“生成一个用户可能会点的 query”改成“生成后立刻通过真实商品检索沙盒验证 query 是否能召回用户可能转化的商品”。模型先用 Memory Tool 将用户三个月级别的长行为压缩成 LatestIntent 与 InterestGraph，再让策略模型调用 Product_Search 工具，基于返回商品迭代修正 query。训练上采用 Chain-of-Retrieval 奖励，把 Query EM、Item HitRate、标题 ROUGE 与格式奖励合在一起，使推荐 query 与下游商品点击/转化一致。
zh.innovation: 过去的 query 推荐更偏 query 语义相关性，容易出现 CTR 高但 CVR 低的 generation-retrieval gap；该文把真实库存检索引入生成闭环，并用一致性奖励把 query 命中和商品命中绑定起来。Memory abstraction 让长行为不直接塞入上下文，适合电商大规模在线部署。方案创新合理且可落地，尤其适合内容电商的搜索、达人商品池召回和意图治理。
zh.key_metrics: 工业离线集上 Q_EM=0.177、I_Hit@1=0.261、Cons@1=0.117；公开集上 I_Hit@1=0.144、Cons@1=0.063。在线 A/B 在千万 DAU 平台提升 Query CTR 2.9%、guided CVR 3.1%。

en.method_overview: QueryAgent-R1 reframes e-commerce query recommendation as retrieval-grounded generation. A memory tool compresses long user behavior into latest intent and an interest graph, while a product-search sandbox validates candidate queries against real inventory. The policy is optimized with a chain-of-retrieval reward that combines query exact match, item hit rate, title ROUGE, and format correctness.
en.innovation: Instead of optimizing only query-level attractiveness, the method closes the generation-retrieval gap by explicitly checking whether recommended queries retrieve products aligned with downstream preference. The memory abstraction and tool loop make the recipe practical for production-scale commerce search and creator-content matching.
en.key_metrics: On the industrial offline set it reports Q_EM=0.177, I_Hit@1=0.261, and Cons@1=0.117; online A/B tests improve Query CTR by 2.9% and guided CVR by 3.1%.

score.rationale_zh: 电商强相关，真实库存检索+一致性RL直接击中搜索转化链路；离线、在线指标都充分，且给出大规模 A/B。主要扣分在真实系统细节和私有数据不可复现。

title: Customer-Agent: Overcoming Context Limitations in Ultra-Long Shopping Trajectories via Tool-Augmented Agents and RLVR

zh.method_overview: Customer-Agent 关注多年购物轨迹导致的超长上下文问题。论文构建 ShopTrajQA：用真实商品信息与模拟购物轨迹生成 32k/64k token 级别的长轨迹 QA，并要求答案可由 SQL/代码命令验证。方法不是把完整轨迹塞入 LLM，而是把轨迹外置成本地文件，让 agent 通过代码解释器、SQL 查询等工具选择性读取；训练采用 SFT 冷启动工具调用，再用 RLVR 的可验证奖励强化正确检索和推理。
zh.innovation: 该文把电商用户行为理解从“长 prompt 能否记住”转为“agent 能否像分析师一样读取外部轨迹文件并执行可验证查询”。这对达人治理中的长周期行为审计、异常交易链路解释、用户/达人画像追溯都很有价值。创新点在于数据构建可验证、工具链绕过上下文窗、RLVR 奖励直接来自可执行答案。
zh.key_metrics: ShopTrajQA 32k 下 Qwen3-1.7B 经 RLVR 从 17% 提升到 59%（+42），Qwen3-4B 从 13% 提升到 62%（+49）；64k 下 Qwen3-1.7B +36，Qwen3-4B +51，并在 AIME 2024/2025 等额外推理任务上展示泛化。

en.method_overview: Customer-Agent builds ShopTrajQA, a 32k/64k-token benchmark for shopping-trajectory QA with executable, verifiable answers. The framework externalizes trajectories as files and trains an agent to retrieve and parse them through code-interpreter or SQL interactions. SFT provides tool-use cold start, and RLVR reinforces answers that can be objectively verified.
en.innovation: The key shift is from stuffing long shopping histories into prompts to training a tool-augmented agent that queries external trajectory files. This is highly relevant to commerce behavior audit, creator profile tracing, and long-horizon governance explanations.
en.key_metrics: On ShopTrajQA-32k, Qwen3-1.7B improves from 17% to 59% after RLVR (+42), and Qwen3-4B improves from 13% to 62% (+49); the 64k setting shows gains of +36 and +51 respectively.

score.rationale_zh: 强电商用户行为理解相关，benchmark 与方法闭环完整；工具外置上下文非常适合治理审计。扣分在轨迹模拟与真实线上业务仍存在 gap。

title: One Model, Multiple Goals: Adaptive Multi-Objective Learning for E-commerce Dialogue Systems

zh.method_overview: MORE 面向电商对话系统中“答得正确”和“说得自然”两个目标冲突的问题。论文发现直接混合 reasoning reward 与 generation reward 会产生震荡，因此把用户属性推理作为训练 scaffold/constraint，而不是推理时显式输出链路。生成阶段再用自适应多奖励机制，把流畅度、自然度、语义忠实度等信号按梯度反馈动态重加权，使模型在不同对话上下文中调节目标权重。
zh.innovation: 该文不是简单多 reward 相加，而是把推理正确性作为约束式训练信号，并用梯度反馈动态调 reward 权重，解决电商客服/导购中事实正确、用户满意和转化目标的冲突。对达人治理中的申诉解释、违规提示、商家/达人沟通机器人也有直接借鉴价值。
zh.key_metrics: 在 ByteDance 两个真实电商对话系统、MultiWOZ 2.2 上均超过强 baseline；14 天线上实验整体转化 +16.53%、触达转化 +30.09%，用户满意 +1.12%，人工转接率 -1.83%；人机对比中恢复约 60% 的人工增量转化。

en.method_overview: MORE addresses the tension between reasoning correctness and natural response generation in e-commerce dialogue. It uses reasoning as a training scaffold/constraint rather than an explicit inference step, then dynamically reweights fluency, naturalness, semantic fidelity, and correctness rewards through gradient feedback.
en.innovation: The method avoids unstable naive reward mixing by separating reasoning constraints from response optimization and adapting reward weights online. This is practical for commerce service, sales assistants, and governance-facing explanation bots.
en.key_metrics: In 14-day ByteDance production experiments, MORE improves overall conversion by 16.53% and reached conversion by 30.09%, increases satisfaction by 1.12%, and reduces handoff rates by 1.83%.

score.rationale_zh: 强电商对话业务相关，线上转化指标亮眼，方法针对多目标冲突有清晰机制；推理 scaffold 不增加推理开销。扣分在开源可复现性与私有线上数据。

title: DataFlow: An LLM-Driven Framework for Unified Data Preparation and Workflow Automation in the Era of Data-Centric AI

zh.method_overview: DataFlow 把 LLM 数据准备从零散脚本升级成可组合 workflow：提供接近 PyTorch 风格的 pipeline API、约 200 个可复用 operator，以及覆盖文本、数学、代码、Text-to-SQL、Agentic RAG、知识抽取的通用流水线。DataFlow-Agent 可以把自然语言需求翻译成数据处理流水线。
zh.innovation: 它的价值在工程抽象而非单点模型结构：把生成、评估、过滤、清洗、增强、RAG 数据构建等治理环节统一成可审计 DAG。对电商内容治理的数据清洗、大规模打标、质检复跑很实用。
zh.key_metrics: 论文报告多个任务中经 DataFlow 处理的数据可提升 LLM 表现，并强调近 200 个 operator 与 6 条 domain-general pipeline 的覆盖；具体增益随任务而变化。

en.method_overview: DataFlow provides a composable LLM-driven data-preparation framework with a PyTorch-like pipeline API, nearly 200 reusable operators, and six general pipelines spanning text, math, code, Text-to-SQL, agentic RAG, and knowledge extraction.
en.innovation: Its main contribution is a system abstraction for auditable data workflows rather than a single model trick. This maps well to content-governance cleaning, labeling, evaluation, and RAG corpus construction.
en.key_metrics: The paper reports performance improvements from DataFlow-processed data across tasks, with the exact gains depending on the downstream pipeline.

score.rationale_zh: 与治理数据质量强相关，工程价值高；但不是今日新 arXiv，且指标更偏系统性展示，未达到高分复现阈值。

title: Disentangled Fine-Grained Prototype Learning for Incomplete Image-Tabular Classification

zh.method_overview: DFPL 解决图像-表格多模态分类中模态缺失的问题。方法用 Shared-Specific Prototype Modeling 抽取共享/模态特定原型，再用 Prototype-guided Fine-grained Alignment 做原型级分布匹配和类语义对齐，最后由 Class-aware Multi-scale Aggregation 融合全局与原型信息。
zh.innovation: 相较只对全局平均特征做对齐的方法，DFPL 把对齐粒度下沉到 token/prototype 层，更适合商品图片+结构化属性不完整的场景。与电商内容理解弱到中等相关，主要启发在缺失属性鲁棒表征。
zh.key_metrics: DVM 车辆图像-表格分类中，缺失 50%/70% tabular 时准确率仍达 93.45%/92.59%，超过最接近 baseline 超过 4.0%；MIMIC 上 70% tabular 缺失时相对 complete-modality TIP 高 4% PRAUC。

en.method_overview: DFPL handles incomplete image-tabular classification by extracting shared and modality-specific prototypes, aligning them through prototype-level distribution and class-semantic constraints, and aggregating global/prototype features for robust prediction.
en.innovation: The method moves missing-modality alignment from coarse global features to fine-grained prototypes, which is useful for product-image plus structured-attribute understanding when metadata is incomplete.
en.key_metrics: On DVM, accuracy remains 93.45% and 92.59% with 50%/70% missing tabular data, more than 4 points above the closest baseline.

score.rationale_zh: 多模态与商品理解有启发，但主场景是医疗/通用图表分类，电商治理相关性不足，未达到复现阈值。
